title: glycine tomentosa
intro: Glycine tomentosa, also known as Licorice Vine or Chinese Licorice, is a perennial vine native to China that belongs to the family Fabaceae. The plant's roots and stems have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Glycine tomentosa include the ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Glycine tomentosa can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its roots and stems are also used in herbal teas and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
